stemHtml: You are flying in continental airspace, but you lose your PBN capability due to suspected GNSS spoofing. There are no ground-based navigation aids available in the area. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: You must maintain your track using heading mode
options.b: You must inform ATC and request radar vectors
options.c: You may continue navigating using the IRS in ATT mode
options.d: You may continue only if flying a lateral offset procedure
